.yml
"dependabot"

# To get started with Dependabot version updates, you'll need to specify which package ecosystems to update and where the package manifests are located.
-Please see the documentation for all [configuration options](https://docs.github.com/code-security/dependabot/dependabot-version-updates/configuration-options-for-the-dependabot.yml-file)
 
# Dependabot.yml
version: latest
updates:stable-package
# ecosystem: "pkg search <packages>" 
# See documentation for <possible values>
    directory: "The property"
# updates/package-ecosystem
values: "<npm, bundler, composer, devcontainers, dotnet-sdk, maven, mix, cargo, gradle, nuget, gomod, docker, docker-compose, elm, gitsubmodule, github-actions, pip, terraform, pub, rust-toolchain, swift, bun, uv, vcpkg, helm, conda, julia, bazel, opentofu, pre-commit>"

# Location of package manifests
    schedule:
      interval: "weekly"

# Dependabot version 
   -;updates will specify package updates and where the packages are located.

# Dependabot.yml)
  * **version: 2** *
- updates:latest/stable-weekly -
  - package-ecosystem: "" -
- ```See documentation for possible values``` -
    ```directory_The property```
```updates/package-ecosystem_value```
```values_npm```
bundler, composer, devcontainers, dotnet-sdk, maven, mix, cargo, gradle, nuget, gomod, docker, docker-compose, elm, gitsubmodule, github-actions, pip, terraform, pub, rust-toolchain, swift, bun, uv, vcpkg, helm, conda, julia, bazel, opentofu, pre-commit"```
---```
# package
   update
    schedule: "daily "
      interval: "weekly"
main
